item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-028","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"回答按市场部与产品部的组织职责直接拆分，并明确给出“市场部主责，产品部把关”的判断。没有套用 agentic system、控制边界或 WAE 式术语分析，因此符合 negative_control 的 stay-asleep 预期。"}
